'''鈭歯-s-k''' ('''nasaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vend|vend]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vend|vend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-s-k
|-
! Lemma
| nasaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nasakithi|nasakithi]] || [[word:nasakiji|nasakiji]] || [[word:nasakishi|nasakishi]] || [[word:nasaki|nasaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasakuthuth|nasakuthuth]] || [[word:nasakujuj|nasakujuj]] || [[word:nasakushush|nasakushush]] || [[word:nasak|nasak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasakuthu|nasakuthu]] || [[word:nasakuju|nasakuju]] || [[word:nasakushu|nasakushu]] || [[word:nasaku|nasaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasakufuth|nasakufuth]] || [[word:nasakufuj|nasakufuj]] || [[word:nasakufush|nasakufush]] || [[word:nasakuf|nasakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nasakethe|nasakethe]] || [[word:nasakeje|nasakeje]] || [[word:nasakeshe|nasakeshe]] || [[word:nasake|nasake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasakothoth|nasakothoth]] || [[word:nasakojoj|nasakojoj]] || [[word:nasakoshosh|nasakoshosh]] || [[word:nasak|nasak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasakotho|nasakotho]] || [[word:nasakojo|nasakojo]] || [[word:nasakosho|nasakosho]] || [[word:nasako|nasako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasakofoth|nasakofoth]] || [[word:nasakofoj|nasakofoj]] || [[word:nasakofosh|nasakofosh]] || [[word:nasakof|nasakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nasak忙th忙|nasak忙th忙]] || [[word:nasak忙j忙|nasak忙j忙]] || [[word:nasak忙sh忙|nasak忙sh忙]] || [[word:nasak忙|nasak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasakathath|nasakathath]] || [[word:nasakajaj|nasakajaj]] || [[word:nasakashash|nasakashash]] || [[word:nasak|nasak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasakatha|nasakatha]] || [[word:nasakaja|nasakaja]] || [[word:nasakasha|nasakasha]] || [[word:nasaka|nasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasakafath|nasakafath]] || [[word:nasakafaj|nasakafaj]] || [[word:nasakafash|nasakafash]] || [[word:nasakaf|nasakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nasakasha|nasakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonasakasha|gonasakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinasakasha|gokinasakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nasakn眉sha|nasakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonasaknkn眉sha|gonasaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinasakn眉sha|gokinasakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nasaksh毛sha|nasaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonasaknksh毛sha|gonasaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinasaksh毛sha|gokinasaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasakrosha|nasakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasaknkrosha|gonasaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasakrosha|gokinasakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nasakmusha|nasakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasaknkmusha|gonasaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasakmusha|gokinasakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nasaksherasha|nasaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonasaknksherasha|gonasaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinasaksherasha|gokinasaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nasakngasha|nasakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonasaknkngasha|gonasaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinasakngasha|gokinasakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nasakyasha|nasakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonasaknkyasha|gonasaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinasakyasha|gokinasakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nasakyamasha|nasakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonasaknkyamasha|gonasaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinasakyamasha|gokinasakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nasakn眉sh毛sha|nasakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonasaknkn眉sh毛sha|gonasaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinasakn眉sh毛sha|gokinasakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasakn眉rosha|nasakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasaknkn眉rosha|gonasaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasakn眉rosha|gokinasakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasakn眉musha|nasakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasaknkn眉musha|gonasaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasakn眉musha|gokinasakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nasaksh毛n眉sha|nasaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonasaknksh毛n眉sha|gonasaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinasaksh毛n眉sha|gokinasaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasaksh毛rosha|nasaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasaknksh毛rosha|gonasaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasaksh毛rosha|gokinasaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasaksh毛musha|nasaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasaknksh毛musha|gonasaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasaksh毛musha|gokinasaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nasakron眉sha|nasakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonasaknkron眉sha|gonasaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinasakron眉sha|gokinasakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nasakrosh毛sha|nasakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonasaknkrosh毛sha|gonasaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinasakrosh毛sha|gokinasakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nasakromusha|nasakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonasaknkromusha|gonasaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinasakromusha|gokinasakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nasakmun眉sha|nasakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonasaknkmun眉sha|gonasaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinasakmun眉sha|gokinasakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nasakmush毛sha|nasakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonasaknkmush毛sha|gonasaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinasakmush毛sha|gokinasakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nasakmurosha|nasakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonasaknkmurosha|gonasaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinasakmurosha|gokinasakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nasak|nasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙s忙k|n忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honasak|honasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙s忙k|hon忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonasak|hohonasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙s忙k|hohon忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nasak|n眉nasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙s忙k|n眉n忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nasak|n眉n眉nasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙s忙k|n眉n眉n忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nasak|n茂nasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙s忙k|n茂n忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nasak|n茂n茂nasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙s忙k|n茂n茂n忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunasak|lunasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙s忙k|lun忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunasak|lulunasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙s忙k|lulun忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linasak|linasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙s忙k|lin忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinasak|lilinasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙s忙k|lilin忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konasak|konasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙s忙k|kon忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonasak|kokonasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙s忙k|kokon忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenasak|kenasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙s忙k|ken忙s忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenasak|kekenasak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙s忙k|keken忙s忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
